title: cymbidium induratifolium
intro: Cymbidium induratifolium, also known as the Asian cymbidium, is a species of orchid native to China. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, including reducing fever, relieving pain, and improving respiratory function. In herbal preparations, the leaves and roots of Cymbidium induratifolium are typically used to make teas, infusions, or tinctures, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety.
